overview: Marhaba Collection is a premium luxury e-commerce mobile web app with a deep dark Teal & Gold theme. It features a full customer shopping experience and a complete admin panel, always displayed inside a realistic phone mockup.
features: Auto-sliding hero banners and flash deals on the home screen
Full product catalog with LED-glowing card borders
Cart, checkout, and order tracking with live status steps
Admin panel with product/banner CRUD wired to the backend
Real-time data sync — admin changes appear on customer pages within seconds
Order map showing delivery city markers and Kishanganj reference zone
Back button navigation inside Admin Panel with smart Dashboard exit
WhatsApp order sharing and PDF invoice generation
